stops.extraction_target: Calculate the number of days between 1918-01-01 and 2026-03-17

from datetime import date
d1 = date.fromisoformat('1918-01-01')
d2 = date.fromisoformat('2026-03-17')
result = abs((d2 - d1).days)
print(result)

riddle:
1. Track down the American pharmaceutical titan seated at the forefront of antiviral innovation; when was this giant born into existence?

2. Seek the healing substances utilized against invisible foes; how many languages make this medicinal knowledge accessible?

3. What is the next prime number greater than your previous count of languages?

4. Discover the expansive range of conditions caused by a particular viral invader; how many languages are available for its detailed description?

5. In the realm of medical research phases, how many subdivisions appear under the section that outlines the design of trials?

6. Unravel the connection between your last number and its binary counterpart; how many 1-bits comprise its representation?

7. This modern marvel employs a new strategy against viruses; how many languages currently engage with its topic?

8. Explore the RNA-based solution that transformed public health; what is the subsection count nestled under 'Society and culture' in the contents?

9. Within the cultural reflections of another COVID-19 vaccine, how many subsections unfold in its societal analysis?

10. Journey to the US initiative that hastened vaccine creation; how many days was it actively operational?

11. Through a binary lens, ascertain the number of 1-bits for the duration you just measured. 

12. Examine a global pandemic from history; how many days stretched between the dawn of 1918 and the spring of 2026?

13. A pioneer of vaccination passed in 2005; how old was he when the curtain fell?

14. When you calculate his age at death, how many divisors does that figure possess?

15. The article containing the nation's legal framework has a broad reach; how many languages echo within its links?

16. Investigate the trades of a British biopharmaceutical giant; what was the trading volume recorded on the final day of 2000?

17. From the last value discovered, how many divisors can be found hidden within it?

18. A biotech firm dedicated to health innovation saw a prominent figure leave; in which month and year did Hal Barron make his exit?

19. Turn your attention to a seminal figure in biomedical engineering; what is the age he stands at today?

20. In assessing public esteem, what Google rating reflects the reputation of the aforementioned scientist?

21. The figure you just found is more than just a number; how many divisors can it claim as its own?

22. Near a historic institute of learning, how many other universities call the vicinity home?

23. Within the framework of modern healthcare, how many critical components shape its landscape?

24. As we venture into parasite treatment, count the languages that provide insights into this necessary remedy.

25. An emergency antidote exists to combat overdoses; how many routes of delivery are indicated in its description?

26. Journey through digital logistics — what is the Fahrenheit scale offset corresponding to a temperature of 45°C?

27. Finally, calculate the absolute value of the expression: abs(clue 5 - clue 20) % 10 to uncover your treasure.
